scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm:start:server" "npm:start:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mario-cards/shared && npm run build -w @mario-cards/web
